narrative:
Mclean Township has 2,375 registered voters, with 52.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.4 percentage points.
